surface_verification.method: Rendered the real MoreOptionsDisclosure/LeadwrightFields/ParamSections/ParamField components against the real index.css theme in a Vite story and screenshotted via Playwright; computed backgroundColor sampled per element.
surface_verification.findings: header #ede8e1 (grey, kept), body #f5f0eb (lighter grey), all fields #ffffff (white), Advanced-parameters card grey header + light body. Matches the requested design.
surface_verification.justification: Trivial UI-color change; F0.5 is advisory at trivial. Verified in a real browser rather than via the full Playwright E2E orchestrator.

test_completeness.justification: Trivial behavior-preserving CSS-color change (no logic); ledger auto-n/a at trivial. Visual result verified in a real browser (pixel-sampled + screenshot).
